name: Hazel Nut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Elizabeth Powell
Preparation Time: 12 hours
Grind nuts in blender or food processor until as fine as flour. Beat eggs and egg white together. Add sugar and the beaten eggs to the ground nuts. Knead until no longer sticky. Form into ovals about 1 inch by 1/2 inch. Place on a slightly buttered cookie sheet. Let stand overnight. The next day, bake at 275°F for 30 minutes or until lightly browned.
